name: Terrain Generator (Geometry Nodes, Blender 4.3)

card: Infinite terrains/landscapes entirely in Geometry Nodes (Blender 4.3), name-a-fair-price ($0+). Customizable rock/grass material, no vegetation. click-to-get on Gumroad.
